info.title: Toku API
info.description: The Toku API lets you programmatically manage token grants, wallets, employees, payroll, and invoices. Build custom integrations and automate your token compensation workflows.

tags.name: Grants
tags.description: Create, list, terminate, and revert token grants

tags.name: Wallets
tags.description: Manage recipient wallets, verification, and distributions

tags.name: Employees
tags.description: Manage user roles within your organization

tags.name: Tokens & Networks
tags.description: Configure token types and blockchain networks for your organization

bearerAuth.description: Personal API token. Create via createUserApiToken endpoint.

grantAmount.description: Total token units (0 for fiat grants)

token.description: The API token value. Store securely — cannot be retrieved again.

get.description: Returns all grants for the authenticated organization. Filter by externalEmployeeID in the response to get grants for a specific employee.

parameters.name: x-role-type
parameters.description: Role context for the request. Use CLIENT_ORG_ADMIN for most integrations.

401.description: Authentication failed — token missing, invalid, or expired

403.description: Caller does not have the required role

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min per IP)

get.description: Returns all grant configuration templates for your organization.

parameters.name: x-role-type
parameters.description: Role context for the request. Use CLIENT_ORG_ADMIN for most integrations.

401.description: Authentication failed — token missing, invalid, or expired

403.description: Caller does not have the required role

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min per IP)

get.description: Returns all grants for a specific employee. Provide either payrollEmployeeID or externalEmployeeID.

parameters.name: x-role-type
parameters.description: Role context for the request. Use CLIENT_ORG_ADMIN for most integrations.

parameters.name: payrollEmployeeID
parameters.description: Payroll identifier. Takes precedence when both are provided.

parameters.name: externalEmployeeID
parameters.description: External HRIS identifier. At least one ID is required.

401.description: Authentication failed — token missing, invalid, or expired

403.description: Caller does not have the required role

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (100 req/min per IP)
